# datawrap

Helpers for the final steps of dataset preparation: auto-cleaning,
creating data dictionaries, and documenting package datasets.

## Installation

You can install the development version of datawrap from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("wranglezone/datawrap")
```

## Usage

Add usage information and examples here.

## Code of Conduct

Please note that the datawrap project is released with a [Contributor
Code of
Conduct](https://wranglezone.github.io/datawrap/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.html).
By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`create_dataset_dictionary()`](https://wranglezone.github.io/datawrap/reference/create_dataset_dictionary.md)
  : Create a data dictionary tibble for a dataset

- [`describe_dataset()`](https://wranglezone.github.io/datawrap/reference/describe_dataset.md)
  :

  Generate a `@format` roxygen2 block for a dataset

- [`finalize_integers()`](https://wranglezone.github.io/datawrap/reference/finalize_integers.md)
  : Downcast integerish columns to integer

- [`write_dataset_dictionary()`](https://wranglezone.github.io/datawrap/reference/write_dataset_dictionary.md)
  : Write an initial data dictionary markdown file for a dataset
